methods.description: This method involves identifying OsLAP6/OsPKS1-related proteins in 19 plant species using NCBI BLASTP, aligning the sequences with ClustalW, generating a phylogenetic tree using MEGA5 with the Neighbor-Joining method, and editing the tree with the Interactive Tree of Life tool.

steps.description: The OsLAP6/OsPKS1-related proteins in 19 plant species were identified by NCBI BLASTP with default parameters using the full-length peptides sequence of OsLAP6/OsPKS1 as a query.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify related proteins using NCBI BLASTP with default parameters

steps.description: The sequences retrieved were aligned with ClustalW.
The MEGA5 program using the Neighbor-Joining method with default parameters besides 1000 bootstrap replications was used to generate the phylogenetic tree.
steps.searchable_summary: Generate phylogenetic tree using MEGA5 with Neighbor-Joining method

steps.description: The phylogenetic tree was further edited by using the Interactive Tree of Life online tool (iTOL).
